rederive: Clone the portrait workspace, then run `cargo run -p portrait-cli -- verify library/finance/escrow/Escrow.portrait` (or `portrait verify library/finance/escrow/Escrow.portrait`). This re-runs portrait_syntax::parse, portrait_sema::check, the lower→project→emit pipeline, and invokes `silverc --constructor-args <ctor> -c <emitted.sil>`, re-deriving every claim above. Do not trust this stamp — reproduce it.

claims.claim: Source parses as a well-formed Portrait program.
Program satisfies portrait-sema's structural static checks (lifecycle reachability, flow integrity, transition/return consistency, value_conserved, no_undeclared_state).
Program lowers and projects to at least one silverscript covenant source (portrait-ir → portrait-project → portrait-emit).
The pinned silverc compiler accepts the emitted .sil with a generated constructor (exit 0).
